user_query: My company is organizing a charity event and we need your assistance. Firstly, we require a list of event venues in Chicago that can accommodate 500 guests. Additionally, we want to verify the email addresses of the event sponsors and attendees for effective communication. Oh, and it would be helpful to check if any of the email addresses are disposable.

TaskList.description: Retrieve a list of event venues in Chicago that can accommodate 500 guests.
Verify the email addresses of event sponsors for effective communication.
Verify the email addresses of attendees for effective communication.
Check if any of the verified email addresses are disposable.
